pages.title: I Said No!
pages.tagline: Step inside the hundred-inch screen of isolation.

pages.body: This gritty East Coast boom bap track runs at roughly one zero eight beats per minute, featuring dusty drums with hard snare cracks and a foghorn bass line mimicking an upright stab. Layered over a dark A minor piano loop and muted trumpet, it creates a sinister yet rubber-hose animated vibe reminiscent of black-and-white nineteen twenties dockside cartoons. The song portrays a wealthy but socially isolated figure who aggressively rejects outsiders despite their admiration for his lifestyle.
pages.styleSentence: A gritty 90s East Coast boom bap track running at roughly 108 BPM featuring dusty drums with hard snare cracks and a foghorn bass line that mimics an upright bass stab, layered over a dark A minor piano loop and muted trumpet to create a sinister yet rubber-hose animated vibe reminiscent of black-and-white 1920s dockside cartoons.

pages.text:
[Verse]
So, they call me Big G with the capital G
I said, "Step into my crib and check my hundred-inch TV"
I got the Rolly with the ice, keep it on the freeze
And I know they ain't got it like this overseas
He said, "Ooh, I like your car"
And he said, "Oh, I like your chain"
And he said, "Damn, I like your shoes"
He said, "Yo, Big G, can I ride with you?"
[Chorus]
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"

[Verse]
So, they call me Big G with the capital G
I said, "Step into my crib and check my hundred-inch TV"
I got the Rolly with the ice, keep it on the freeze
And I know they ain't got it like this overseas
He said, "Ooh, I like your car"
And he said, "Oh, I like your chain"
And he said, "Damn, I like your shoes"
He said, "Yo, Big G, can I ride with you?"

[Chorus]
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"

pages.vocalStyle: Aggressive male rap duo with raspy street vocals utilizing call-and-response ad-libs

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Projects arrogant disdain with raspy street vocals.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Echoes every rejection into the hollow void behind.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds rhythmic texture to the dusty sonic landscape.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Provides foghorn stabs that mimic upright bass hits.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves dark atmosphere around the piano loop core.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Layers muted trumpet into the sinister animated vibe.
